notes: Probe-validated: ~30 recent items via the leader.ir RSS feed (Supreme Leader Khamenei - the actual head of state; president.ir is a separate lower office). country=Iran; source_url=https://www.leader.ir/fa/rss; region=Asia; iso3n=364; source_type=official_gov; content_format=fulltext | RECENT-ONLY (feed depth ~30). WHY feed: the HTML speech listings are JS-hydrated and paginate by a Solar-Hijri ?year= param that is UNRELIABLE (year=1390 returned the newest ids). Feed pubDate is GREGORIAN -> sidesteps the Solar-Hijri trap; feed carries no body so use_content=false fetches each /fa/content page (body in <article id=details>). DEEP archive is a follow-up.
